ddls:
CREATE TABLE "opinions" (
  "opinion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opinion category */,
  "category" TEXT /* Name of the opinion category (e.g., strongly support, somewhat support) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the opinion category */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue associated with the opinion category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the opinion category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opinion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "level" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., no high school, high school graduate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the education level was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent (e.g., male, female) */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Education level of the respondent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the respondent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the respondent was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the respondent's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "opinion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opinion category */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was recorded */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue associated with the response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_opinion_id FOREIGN KEY ("opinion_id") REFERENCES opinions ("opinion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentages" (
  "percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage */,
  "opinion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opinion category */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents for the opinion category and education level */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with the percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the percentage was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentages_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentages_opinion_id FOREIGN KEY ("opinion_id") REFERENCES opinions ("opinion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentages_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being surveyed */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "survey_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey response was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
